run: if ! command -v terraform &>/dev/null; then echo 'ERROR: Terraform is not installed. Install Terraform to work on hub_infra.'; exit 1; fi

echo "Terraform version: $(terraform version -json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("terraform_version","unknown"))' 2>/dev/null || terraform version 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
